articles.title: Designing Frictionless SaaS Onboarding Flows in 2023
articles.summary: A practical guide to crafting SaaS onboarding experiences that activate users quickly without overwhelming them.
articles.content: In this article we break down the anatomy of an effective SaaS onboarding flow: first-run experience, contextual education, progressive disclosure, and ongoing nudges. We cover patterns for welcome tours, empty states, checklists, and lifecycle emails, including examples from leading SaaS products...

articles.title: 5 Onboarding Metrics Every SaaS Product Team Should Track
articles.summary: How to measure the real impact of your SaaS onboarding with activation, time-to-value, and early retention metrics.
articles.content: Onboarding is only as good as the outcomes it creates. In this article we outline the core metrics that should sit on every SaaS product team's dashboard...

articles.title: UX Patterns That Boost Ecommerce Conversion Rates
articles.summary: From navigation to checkout, these UX patterns can help lift ecommerce conversion rates without redesigning from scratch.
articles.content: Small UX improvements compound into meaningful revenue. In this case we review patterns around product discovery, merchandising, and checkout...

articles.title: Web Design Trends for 2024: What Actually Matters
articles.summary: A practical look at 2024 design trends that improve usability instead of just aesthetics.
articles.content: Trend lists often focus on visuals, but the most important shifts in 2024 are in accessibility, performance, and content design...

articles.title: Planning a B2B Website Redesign Without Losing SEO
articles.summary: How to rework your information architecture, templates, and content while protecting organic traffic.
articles.content: Redesigns are risky for established B2B sites. In this guide we cover redirects, content audits, and incremental launch strategies...

articles.title: UX Research Methods: A Beginner-Friendly Overview
articles.summary: An overview of common UX research methods and when to use each in your product lifecycle.
articles.content: From moderated usability testing to diary studies and field visits, we explore core research methods...

articles.title: Branding First or Website First? How to Sequence Your Revamp
articles.summary: Should you finalize your new brand before redesigning your website? It depends on these factors.
articles.content: When brand and website projects overlap, planning becomes critical. In this article we map three typical scenarios...

articles.title: A Content Design Checklist for Your Next Website Launch
articles.summary: Use this checklist to make sure your content is launch-ready, from messaging hierarchy to microcopy.
articles.content: Content is often the last thing teams think about before launch. This checklist helps you catch gaps early...

articles.title: Designing SaaS Pricing Pages That Convert
articles.summary: A teardown of high-performing SaaS pricing pages with actionable design recommendations.
articles.content: Pricing pages are where business strategy meets UX. We explore comparison tables, toggles, FAQs, and social proof...

articles.title: When Your Design System Is Holding You Back
articles.summary: Signs that your design system needs a rethink and how to evolve it without chaos.
articles.content: Design systems create consistency—but can also calcify. In this piece we examine anti-patterns...

articles.title: Using AI Assistants in UX Research Workflows
articles.summary: Early experiments in using AI to speed up analysis, recruit participants, and generate discussion guides.
articles.content: AI tools are changing how research teams work. We look at practical, low-risk ways to integrate them...
